title: Silky Sour Tunisian Cucumber Salad
description: A bright, chilled cucumber salad with a silky tahinilemon dressing, lightly blanched for a crisp snap and finished with aromatic herbs.
instructions: Fill a large pot with salted water and bring to a rolling boil. Slice cucumbers into ¼‑inch thick rounds, leaving skins on.
Blanch cucumber slices for 30 seconds, then transfer immediately to a bowl of ice‑cold water to stop the cooking process.
Drain cucumbers in a colander and pat dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl whisk together olive oil, tahini, lemon juice, white wine vinegar, dried oregano, and black pepper until the mixture is smooth and slightly creamy.
Season the dressing with sea salt to taste.
Place blanched cucumber slices in a large salad bowl, drizzle with the dressing, and toss gently to coat.
Sprinkle chopped mint and parsley over the salad and give a final light toss.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
Serve the salad cold, optionally garnished with a few extra mint leaves.
